summary: Chantier 6 Bug Fix — POST /api/projects/:id/budget-revision + P2 Tooltip. All 8 backend tests pass (100%). All UI flows verified: budget revision modal with empty author closes successfully (no 500 error), tooltip '?' visible in ProjectModal next to 'Total budget'.
seed_data_creation: Test revisions added to first project (via backend tests). Test-Budget-02 project created and deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chantier 6 bug fix fully validated. Fix: .sub → .email in budget-revision author fallback (line 391). All 8 scenarios pass: author empty→email fallback, author=null→email fallback, explicit author kept, 404 fake project, 403 READ_ONLY, 200 PMO, history grows by 1, new project revision. UI: BudgetRevisionModal submits with empty author → modal closes (success). ProjectModal: tooltip '?' badge visible next to 'Total budget' (only appears when CAPEX/OPEX > 0). Chantier 7 (risks) not retested but no code changes were made.

test_results.author_empty_fallback: PASS — no author in body → author = admin@altair.fr
test_results.new_project_revision: PASS — new project created, revision applied → 200
test_results.ui_empty_author_modal: PASS — modal closes successfully with empty author
test_results.ui_tooltip_badge: PASS — '?' badge visible in ProjectModal Budget section (when CAPEX > 0)
test_results.ui_tooltip_text_in_dom: PASS — 'L'EAC initial est égal au budget total' found in DOM
